title: January 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 5''' is the 5th day of the year. 360 days (361 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Russ Manning]] is born.
*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Clancy Brown]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Jiang Wen]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 81|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 81]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 2]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – [[Destabilization (article)|''Destabilization'']] article published on [[Wizards of the Coast]] website.
*[[2013]] – "[[Missing in Action]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – "[[Path of the Jedi]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2015 – [[Khan Bonfils]] dies.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars: I Am a Droid (Golden Book)|''Star Wars: I Am a Droid'']] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars: I Am a Jedi (Golden Book)|''Star Wars: I Am a Jedi'']] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars: I Am a Pilot (Golden Book)|''Star Wars: I Am a Pilot'']] published.
*2016 – The [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens (novelization)|novelization]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']] published in hardcover.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 2 — Shadows and Secrets]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – "[[The Mutiny]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – [[The Mandalorian Junior Novel|''The Mandalorian'' Junior Novel]] published.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: Light of the Jedi]]'' published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: Light of the Jedi (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Light of the Jedi'' audiobook]] released.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: A Test of Courage]]'' published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: A Test of Courage (audiobook)|''The High Republic: A Test of Courage'' audiobook]] released.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: The Great Jedi Rescue]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: A Galaxy for Everyone]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Galactic Storybook]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 17|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 17]] published.
*2022 – "[[Chapter 2: The Tribes of Tatooine]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars Insider 224|''Star Wars Insider'' 224]] to be published.
